title: Sentinel APEX Intelligence Report: Google fixes fourth actively exploited Chrome zero-day of 20
entity: Google fixes fourth actively exploited Chrome zero-day of 20

sections.executive_summary: This report covers Google fixes fourth actively exploited Chrome zero-day of 20 - a threat with risk score 10.0/10. Priority: P1_CRITICAL. CISA KEV confirms active exploitation. Affected sectors: Chrome.
sections.technical_analysis:
Threat: Google fixes fourth actively exploited Chrome zero-day of 2026
Risk Score: 10.0/10 | Exploitability: 7.5/10
Attributed Actor: CDB-FIN-09
Attack Vectors: Supply Chain - Compromise; Client - Exploitation for Client Execution; Execution - Command and Scripting Interpreter
Impact: CATASTROPHIC - Complete system compromise likely
Attack Chain: Initial Access (T1195) -> Execution (T1203,T1059)
[!] CISA KEV: Confirmed active exploitation - federal patch mandate active
ASSESSMENT: CRITICAL - Immediate defensive action required. Activate IR procedures.
mitigation_guidance: Apply vendor patches for Google fixes fourth actively exploited Chrome zero-day of 20
